{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Blackflame elders
| introduced = Blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Blackflame elders]] can use the control center to test their juniors.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c12">''Blackflame'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
